titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Susan Cole Papers
titlestmt.author: by Tina Evans and Rosemary K. J. Davis

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday May 20, 2025 at 23:05

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged in four series: Series I. Absent one: mourning ritual, tragedy, and the performance of ambivalence, 1979 - 1993. II. Directors in rehearsal: a hidden world, 1976-1994, undated. III. Playwrights in rehearsal: the seduction of company, 1982 - 2000. IV. Research files related to Joseph Chaiken, 1997 - 2005.

bioghist.head: Susan Cole
bioghist.p: Susan Letzler Cole (1940-) is an American educator and author. Born in Washington, District of Columbia, Cole graduated with a Bachelor of Arts degree from Duke University in 1962. She then attended Harvard University, where she received her Master of Arts in 1963 and a Doctor of Philosophy degree in 1968. Her notable works include The Absent One , Directors in Rehearsal: A Hidden World , and Playwrights in Rehearsal: The Seduction of Company . Cole is a professor of English at the Albertus Magnus College in New Haven, Connecticut.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Susan Cole papers. Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection contains writings, typescripts, research files, notes, bibliography cards, photographs, publicity materials, printed material, and materials related to the life and work of Susan Cole, including papers related to Cole's publications: The Absent One: Mourning Ritual, Tragedy, and the Performance of Ambivalence , Directors in Rehearsal: A Hidden World , and Playwrights in Rehearsal: the Seduction of Company . Research files related to Joseph Chaiken are also included.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Susan Cole papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information consult the appropriate curator.

did.unittitle: Absent one: mourning ritual, tragedy, and the performance of ambivalence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains writings, notes, drafts, typescripts, and other materials related to Cole's book The Absent One: Mourning Ritual, Tragedy, and the Performance of Ambivalence . Original annotated envelopes are retained in folders with material.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials maintain arrangement found at time of acquisition.

arrangement.p: Materials maintain arrangement found at time of acquisition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains writings, notes, drafts, and other materials related to Cole's book Directors in Rehearsal: A Hidden World . Original annotated envelopes are retained in folders with material.

Playwrights in rehearsal: the seduction of company

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains writings, notes, drafts, printed material, photographs and other materials related to Cole's book Playwrights in Rehearsal: The Seduction of Company . Original annotated envelopes are retained in folders with materials.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials maintain arrangement found at time of acquisition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original folders retained with material. Note that the description of materials in the finding aid accurately reflects the contents of folders even if the original folder labels do not.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original folders retained with material. Note that the description of materials in the finding aid accurately reflects the contents of folders even if the original folder labels do not.

did.unittitle: Materials related to identifying and obtaining photos for Directors in rehearsal

Chapter 3 Elizabeth Egloff the devils revised draft
Chapter 4 Suzan-Luri Parks: in the blood & topdog and underdog previous draft
Chapter 5: Tony Kushner it's an undoing world & terminating previous drafts

Chapter 2 David Rabe a question of mercy revised draft
Chapter 3 Elizabeth Egloff the devils revised draft

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials maintain arrangement found at time of acquisition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains notes and other materials related to Cole's research on Joseph Chaiken.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folders contain notebook, notes, research notes, and printed material.
